column4: Description
column11: Respone
column13: Note

column4: Returns medication dashboard for current shift with summary stats, med-pass list, allergy alerts, and shift handoff notes. Supports filtering by shift and status.
column9: shift (string, optional) - DAY/EVENING/NIGHT; status (string, optional) - ALL/PENDING/OVERDUE/COMPLETED; date (date, optional) - YYYY-MM-DD
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Success", "data": { "shift": "DAY", "date": "2026-07-08", "summary": { "pending": 24, "completed": 48, "overdue": 3, "missed": 2 }, "global_allergy_alerts": [ { "resident_id": "uuid", "resident_name": "John Smith", "allergy": "Penicillin", "unconfirmed": true } ], "med_pass_list": [ { "resident_id": "uuid", "resident_name": "Mary Brown", "room_number": "118", "bed_number": "A", "status": "OVERDUE", "next_medication": { "order_id": "uuid", "drug_name": "Insulin 6 Units", "scheduled_time": "08:00", "time_window_start": "07:30", "time_window_end": "08:30" }, "has_unconfirmed_allergy": false } ], "shift_handoff_notes": "Patient 208 refused breakfast..." } }
column13: Status colors: GREEN (on-time), AMBER (due soon), RED (overdue)

column4: Initiates a medication pass session for a specific resident. Returns resident info with allergies, pending medications, and session ID.
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Success", "data": { "session_id": "uuid", "resident": { "id": "uuid", "full_name": "John Smith", "room_number": "208", "bed_number": "B", "date_of_birth": "1945-03-12", "allergies": ["Penicillin", "Sulfa"], "allergy_confirmed": false }, "pending_medications": [ { "order_id": "uuid", "drug_name": "Aspirin 100 mg", "dosage": "100 mg", "route": "ORAL", "frequency": "Every 8 hours", "scheduled_time": "08:00", "is_controlled_substance": false } ] } }
column13: Session expires after 30 minutes of inactivity

column4: Processes barcode scan (camera or manual entry). Verifies 5 Rights and returns verification status. If mismatch, requires override.
column11: SUCCESS: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Verification passed", "data": { "verification_status": "MATCHED", "five_rights": { "right_resident": { "passed": true, "detail": "Matches resident" }, "right_medication": { "passed": true, "detail": "Matches order" }, "right_dose": { "passed": true, "detail": "100 mg matches" }, "right_route": { "passed": true, "detail": "ORAL route confirmed" }, "right_time": { "passed": true, "detail": "Within ?30 min window" } }, "can_administer": true, "requires_override": false } } FAILED: { "statusCode": 400, "message": "Verification failed - requires override", "data": { "five_rights": { "right_resident": { "passed": true }, "right_medication": { "passed": false, "detail": "Scanned: Amoxicillin, Expected: Aspirin" }, "right_dose": { "passed": true }, "right_route": { "passed": true }, "right_time": { "passed": false, "detail": "Outside ?30 min window (scheduled 08:00, scanned 08:45)" } }, "can_administer": false, "requires_override": true, "override_reasons": ["BARCODE_UNREADABLE", "EMERGENCY", "TIME_WINDOW_EXCEPTION", "PATIENT_UNAVAILABLE", "OTHER"] } }
column13: Time window: 30 minutes from scheduled time. Controlled substances require witness

column4: Confirms medication administration after successful barcode verification. Records medication log with status and timestamp.
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Medication administered successfully", "data": { "log_id": 123456, "order_id": "uuid", "status": "ADMINISTERED", "administered_at": "2026-07-08T08:05:00+07:00", "administered_by": "Nurse Jane Doe (RN)", "witnessed_by": "Nurse John Smith (LPN)" } }
column13: Witness is REQUIRED if is_controlled_substance = true

column4: Overrides failed verification (barcode mismatch or time window exception). Requires override reason and clinical justification. Logs override in audit trail.
column10: { "session_id": "uuid", "order_id": "uuid", "override_reason": "TIME_WINDOW_EXCEPTION", "other_reason_text": null, "confirm_clinically_justified": true, "administered_by": "uuid", "witnessed_by": "uuid (optional)", "notes": "Physician Dr. Anderson approved late administration" }
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Override confirmed and logged", "data": { "log_id": 123457, "order_id": "uuid", "status": "ADMINISTERED", "is_override": true, "override_reason": "TIME_WINDOW_EXCEPTION", "administered_at": "2026-07-08T08:45:00+07:00", "administered_by": "Nurse Jane Doe (RN)", "witnessed_by": "Nurse John Smith (LPN)", "audit_log": "Override logged with credentials and timestamp" } }
column13: other_reason_text REQUIRED if override_reason = OTHER. All overrides logged to audit_logs and phi_access_logs

column4: Marks medication as refused by resident. Records refusal reason. No administration occurs.
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Medication marked as refused", "data": { "log_id": 123458, "order_id": "uuid", "status": "REFUSED", "logged_at": "2026-07-08T08:10:00+07:00", "administered_by": "Nurse Jane Doe (RN)" } }
column13: Refusal status is logged in medication_logs with status = 'REFUSED'

column4: Marks medication as missed (not administered on time). Requires miss reason.
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Medication marked as missed", "data": { "log_id": 123459, "order_id": "uuid", "status": "MISSED", "logged_at": "2026-07-08T08:15:00+07:00", "administered_by": "Nurse Jane Doe (RN)" } }
column13: Missed status is logged in medication_logs with status = 'HELD' or 'NOT_AVAILABLE'

column4: Retrieves Medication Administration Record (MAR) for a specific resident. Returns medication grid with daily status for each scheduled dose. Supports date range and status filters.
column9: resident_id (path, required) - UUID; date_range (string, optional) - TODAY/THIS_WEEK/THIS_MONTH; status_filter (string, optional) - ALL/ADMINISTERED/MISSED/REFUSED/OVERRIDE; start_date (date, optional) - YYYY-MM-DD; end_date (date, optional) - YYYY-MM-DD
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Success", "data": { "resident": { "id": "uuid", "full_name": "John Smith", "room_number": "208", "bed_number": "B" }, "date_range": { "start": "2026-07-01", "end": "2026-07-08" }, "medication_grid": [ { "order_id": "uuid", "drug_name": "Aspirin 100 mg", "dosage": "100 mg", "route": "ORAL", "frequency": "Every 8 hours", "days": [ { "date": "2026-07-08", "scheduled_time": "08:00", "status": "ADMINISTERED", "administered_by": "Nurse Jane Doe (RN)", "witnessed_by": null, "logged_at": "2026-07-08T08:05:00+07:00", "notes": "Patient took with water", "override_reason": null }, { "date": "2026-07-08", "scheduled_time": "16:00", "status": "SCHEDULED", "administered_by": null, "logged_at": null } ] } ], "summary_stats": { "total_scheduled": 21, "administered": 18, "missed": 1, "refused": 1, "overrides": 1 } } }
column13: CNA only has VIEW permission. Status icons:?(Administered), ?(Missed), ?(Refused), ?(Override)

column4: Exports MAR as PDF for printing. Includes resident info, medication grid, and summary stats.
column9: resident_id (path, required) - UUID; date_range (string, optional) - TODAY/THIS_WEEK/THIS_MONTH; start_date (date, optional); end_date (date, optional)
column11: Response: application/pdf (file download); Headers: Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="MAR_JohnSmith_2026-07-08.pdf"
column13: Generates PDF with MAR report. Printable format includes legend: ?Administered, ?Missed, ?Refused, ?Override

column4: Returns list of medications pending administration for a specific resident in current shift. Used for Med-Pass queue management.
column9: resident_id (path, required) - UUID; time (time, optional) - HH:MM (default: current time)
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Success", "data": { "resident_id": "uuid", "pending_medications": [ { "order_id": "uuid", "drug_name": "Aspirin 100 mg", "scheduled_time": "08:00", "time_window_start": "07:30", "time_window_end": "08:30", "is_overdue": false, "minutes_until_due": 15, "requires_witness": false } ] } }
column13: Shows medications scheduled within 2 hours of current time

column4: Returns list of medication orders for a resident. Supports filtering by status (ACTIVE/DISCONTINUED/ON_HOLD) and search by drug name.
column7: RN, LPN, CNA, DON, Doctor, Billing
column9: resident_id (path, required) - UUID; status (string, optional) - ACTIVE/DISCONTINUED/ON_HOLD (default: ACTIVE); search (string, optional) - search by drug name
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Success", "data": { "resident_id": "uuid", "orders": [ { "order_id": "uuid", "drug_name": "Aspirin 100 mg", "dosage": "100 mg", "route": "ORAL", "frequency": "Every 8 hours", "start_date": "2026-06-01", "status": "ACTIVE", "prescribed_by": { "id": "uuid", "name": "Dr. Anderson", "license_number": "MD12345" }, "allergy_conflict": false, "last_administered_at": "2026-07-08T08:05:00+07:00", "last_administered_by": "Nurse Jane Doe (RN)", "schedules": [ { "id": 1, "scheduled_time": "08:00", "is_active": true }, { "id": 2, "scheduled_time": "16:00", "is_active": true } ], "prescriber_notes": "Take with food if patient complains of GI upset" } ] } }
column13: Billing can view medication orders for billing purposes only. Allergy conflict flag checks against resident's allergies

column4: Creates a new medication order for a resident. Only Doctors and DON can prescribe. Automatically generates medication schedules based on frequency.
column10: { "drug_name": "Lisinopril 10 mg", "dosage": "10 mg", "route": "ORAL", "frequency": "Once daily", "start_date": "2026-07-08", "prescriber_notes": "Monitor blood pressure daily", "is_controlled_substance": false, "scheduled_times": ["08:00"] }
column11: { "statusCode": 201, "message": "Medication order created successfully", "data": { "order_id": "uuid", "drug_name": "Lisinopril 10 mg", "dosage": "10 mg", "route": "ORAL", "frequency": "Once daily", "status": "ACTIVE", "schedules": [ { "id": 1, "scheduled_time": "08:00", "is_active": true } ] } }
column13: scheduled_times array required. System validates no duplicate order conflicts

column4: Discontinues an active medication order. Sets status to DISCONTINUED and deactivates all schedules.
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Medication order discontinued", "data": { "order_id": "uuid", "status": "DISCONTINUED", "discontinued_at": "2026-07-08T14:00:00+07:00", "discontinued_by": "Dr. Anderson", "discontinue_reason": "Switched to different medication" } }
column13: Cannot discontinue if there are pending (scheduled but not administered) doses. Must reschedule or administer first

column4: Returns detailed information for a specific medication order, including full prescription notes and administration history.
column7: RN, LPN, CNA, DON, Doctor, Billing
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Success", "data": { "order_id": "uuid", "drug_name": "Aspirin 100 mg", "dosage": "100 mg", "route": "ORAL", "frequency": "Every 8 hours", "start_date": "2026-06-01", "status": "ACTIVE", "prescribed_by": { "id": "uuid", "name": "Dr. Anderson", "license_number": "MD12345" }, "prescriber_notes": "Take with food if patient complains of GI upset", "allergy_conflict": false, "is_controlled_substance": false, "schedules": [ { "id": 1, "scheduled_time": "08:00", "is_active": true }, { "id": 2, "scheduled_time": "16:00", "is_active": true } ], "recent_logs": [ { "log_id": 123456, "status": "ADMINISTERED", "administered_by": "Nurse Jane Doe (RN)", "logged_at": "2026-07-08T08:05:00+07:00" } ] } }
column13: Includes last 7 days of administration logs

column4: Returns the complete medication schedule for the entire facility for a specific shift. Used for shift handoff and planning.
column9: shift (string, required) - DAY/EVENING/NIGHT; date (date, optional) - YYYY-MM-DD (default: today)
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Success", "data": { "shift": "DAY", "date": "2026-07-08", "schedule": [ { "resident_id": "uuid", "resident_name": "Mary Brown", "room_number": "118", "medications": [ { "order_id": "uuid", "drug_name": "Insulin 6 Units", "dosage": "6 Units", "scheduled_time": "08:00", "status": "SCHEDULED" } ] } ] } }
column13: Used by Charge Nurse to assign and distribute workload. Only includes ACTIVE orders

column4: Allows nurse to administer multiple medications at once for the same resident (bulk operation). Reduces clicks for multiple medications.
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Batch administration completed", "data": { "total": 3, "administered": 3, "failed": 0, "logs": [ { "order_id": "uuid1", "status": "ADMINISTERED", "log_id": 123460 }, { "order_id": "uuid2", "status": "ADMINISTERED", "log_id": 123461 }, { "order_id": "uuid3", "status": "ADMINISTERED", "log_id": 123462 } ] } }
column13: All medications must have already passed barcode verification. Cannot batch if any requires override

column4: Administrative function to regenerate medication schedules for an order when frequency changes.
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Schedules regenerated successfully", "data": { "order_id": "uuid", "schedules": [ { "id": 1, "scheduled_time": "08:00", "is_active": true }, { "id": 2, "scheduled_time": "16:00", "is_active": true }, { "id": 3, "scheduled_time": "00:00", "is_active": true } ] } }
column13: Existing schedules are deactivated (is_active=false) before creating new ones

column4: Retrieves audit trail for all medication-related actions. Tracks who viewed, administered, overrode, or modified medication orders.
column9: resident_id (string, optional) - UUID; order_id (string, optional) - UUID; action (string, optional) - VIEW/ADMINISTER/OVERRIDE/MODIFY; start_date (date, required) - YYYY-MM-DD; end_date (date, required) - YYYY-MM-DD; page (int, optional) - default: 1; limit (int, optional) - default: 50
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Success", "data": { "total": 150, "page": 1, "limit": 50, "logs": [ { "log_id": 123456, "table_name": "medication_logs", "record_id": "123456", "action": "INSERT", "old_data": null, "new_data": "{"status":"ADMINISTERED",...}", "performed_by": "Nurse Jane Doe (RN)", "performed_at": "2026-07-08T08:05:00+07:00", "ip_address": "192.168.1.100" } ] } }
column13: PHI access logs record every VIEW of medication data. Mandatory for HIPAA compliance

column4: Retrieves all PHI access logs for medication data. Required for HIPAA disclosure tracking.
column9: resident_id (string, required) - UUID; access_type (string, optional) - VIEW/PRINT/EXPORT/DOWNLOAD; start_date (date, required); end_date (date, required)
column11: { "statusCode": 200, "message": "Success", "data": { "logs": [ { "id": 123, "table_name": "medication_orders", "record_id": "uuid", "accessed_by": "Nurse John Smith (LPN)", "access_type": "VIEW", "access_reason": "Shift handoff review", "ip_address": "192.168.1.101", "accessed_at": "2026-07-08T07:30:00+07:00" } ] } }
column13: Tracks who VIEWED medication data, not just modified. Required for HIPAA compliance

column4: Exports MAR audit report as CSV for regulatory compliance (CMS, state surveyors).
column9: resident_id (string, optional) - UUID; start_date (date, required); end_date (date, required)
column11: Response: text/csv (file download); Headers: Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="MAR_Audit_2026-07-08.csv"
column13: Includes columns: Date, Resident, Medication, Status, Administered By, Witness, Override Reason, Timestamp
